title: Google Maps MCP via npx with an API-key env → REVIEW (secret + unpinned)

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/google-maps/README.md, NPX variant). Verbatim except normalization to a valid JSON root. The GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY value <YOUR_API_KEY> is upstream's own placeholder.

humanExpectation.rationale: An unpinned npx package (@modelcontextprotocol/server-google-maps, no version) → supply.unpinned-package (high, S1); plus a GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY credential env → secrets.env-key (medium, S2). Two non-blocking findings → REVIEW. This pins the common 'npx package + API_KEY' real shape with a *_API_KEY name (distinct from the *_TOKEN shapes in C017/C042 and the *_SECRET shapes in C039).
knownLimitations: secrets.env-key matches GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY on the API_KEY hint. The package is unpinned because the upstream docs ship it without a version; a pinned spec would drop supply.unpinned-package but keep the secret finding (still REVIEW).
